hero.headline: Expert Help Navigating Bangladesh's Government Services
hero.subheadline: Professional consulting services for Bangladeshis at home and abroad. From company formation to government certificates — we handle it all so you don't have to.
hero.trustLine: Trusted by Bangladeshis across the UK, USA, Middle East & beyond

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive support for all your Bangladesh government needs

companyFormation.name: Company Formation

bankAccount.name: Bank Account Opening
bankAccount.description: Open a personal or business bank account in Bangladesh with expert assistance.

tradeLicence.short: City Corporation Trade Licence applications & renewals

bstiMark.name: BSTI Mark

teaBoardLicence.name: Tea Board Licence

passport.name: Passport Services

nationalId.description: Apply for a new NID, make corrections or updates with our expert guidance.

nationalUniversity.name: National University Certificate
nationalUniversity.description: Retrieve, verify or correct National University certificates and transcripts.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Our simple three-step process gets your documents sorted without the stress
howItWorks.step1Desc: Contact us via WhatsApp or our form. We'll assess your requirements and explain exactly what's needed.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our team of experts, accountants and solicitors prepares all paperwork and liaises with the relevant authorities on your behalf.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We deliver your completed documents or certificates, keeping you updated every step of the way.

trust.title: Why Choose Bengal Consulting?
trust.subtitle: Years of real, on-the-ground experience in Bangladesh sets us apart
trust.reason1Desc: We have years of experience navigating Bangladesh's government — not just theoretical knowledge.
trust.reason2Desc: Direct access to qualified accountants, solicitors and government-registered agents.
trust.reason3Desc: We understand the unique challenges faced by Bangladeshis living abroad and design our services accordingly.
trust.reason4Desc: We keep you informed at every step. No hidden fees, no surprises.
trust.reason5Desc: From a single certificate to full company formation — we cover every aspect of Bangladesh compliance.
trust.reason6Desc: We serve clients across the UK, USA, Canada, Middle East and beyond, all remotely and efficiently.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Ready to get started? Contact us today for a free consultation.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Please describe what you need help with...
contact.successDesc: Thank you for contacting us. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.errorDesc: Please try again or contact us directly via WhatsApp.
contact.ctaSubtitle: Speak to our experts today — no obligation, no jargon.

about.title: About Bengal Consulting
about.subtitle: Real experience. Real experts. Real results.
about.story: Bengal Consulting was founded with a simple mission: to make Bangladesh's complex bureaucratic processes accessible to everyone — whether you're a local entrepreneur, an expat living abroad, or a foreign national looking to invest in Bangladesh.
about.missionText: To simplify Bangladesh's government for every client, providing expert guidance backed by years of real, on-the-ground experience.
about.expertiseText: Our team includes qualified accountants, legal experts and government-registered agents who have spent years helping individuals and businesses navigate the National Board of Revenue, Bangladesh Bank, RJSC, City Corporations and other government bodies.
about.expatsText: A significant part of our business serves the Bangladeshi diaspora — expats in the UK, USA, Middle East and beyond who need assistance with official matters back home. We bridge the distance and the complexity.

footer.tagline: Expert Bangladesh consulting for locals and expats worldwide.
footer.disclaimer: Prices shown are indicative. Contact us for a tailored quote.

servicePage.ctaSubtitle: Contact us today for a free, no-obligation consultation.
